MERIDIAN - Final Warning

Dear Golden Customer,

FINAL NOTICE: This is a final notice regarding invoice INV-GOLDEN for £500.00,
which is now 45 days overdue.

If payment is not received or a payment arrangement is not made within 48 hours, your account
will be frozen and all services suspended.

To prevent service interruption, please make payment immediately or contact our support team.
